title: Refactor: Implement immutable data structures
original_text: Refactored to use immutable data structures. Replaced mutable state with immutable objects. Implemented immutable collections with libraries. Added deep cloning for nested objects. Implemented state management with immutable patterns. Result: immutable data structures implemented.
expected_body_lines: - Replace mutable state with immutable objects
- Add deep cloning for nested objects
- Implement state management with immutable patterns
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(data): implement immutable data structures"
